intentSynonyms: get a document text in msword
look up a document text in msword
fetch a single document text in msword
view one specific document text in msword
extract text from a word document in msword
description: Extract plain text content from a Word document (.docx). Downloads the binary file, decompresses the OOXML archive, and extracts text from all paragraphs. Returns paragraphs as an array of strings.

item_id.description: File ID of the .docx document (from list_children or search_files)
